title: No Hitbox Eye Line
description: Removes the eye direction arrow from F3+B entity hitboxes.
body:
# No Eye Line

Clean up your hitboxes.

**No Eye Line** is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft that removes the annoying eye direction line rendered inside entity hitboxes.

Perfect for PvP, practice servers, testing, content creation, and general gameplay where cleaner hitbox rendering matters.

---

## ✨ Features

### 🧹 Removes eye direction lines

Minecraft normally renders a line from the entity’s eyes while hitboxes are enabled (`F3 + B`).

This mod completely removes that line while keeping the rest of the hitbox rendering untouched.

---

## 🎯 Why use it?

The vanilla eye line can:

* clutter the screen
* make hitboxes harder to read
* interfere during PvP
* look distracting in recordings/screenshots
* reduce visual clarity during testing

No Eye Line keeps hitboxes clean and minimal.

---

## ⚡ Client-side

* Works entirely on the client
* Does not require server installation
* Safe to use on servers
* No gameplay changes

---

## 📦 Requirements

* Minecraft
* Fabric Loader

---

## 🖼 Comparison

### Vanilla

```text
Hitbox + eye direction line
```

### With No Eye Line

```text
Clean hitbox without eye line
```

---

## 🚀 Lightweight

* No configuration
* No dependencies
* Minimal performance impact
* Simple and focused functionality

---
